# remnawave_snippet (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave Xray config snippet (keyed by name).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "remnawave_snippet" "routing_rules" {
  name = "block-ads"
  snippet = jsonencode([
    {
      type        = "field"
      outboundTag = "block"
      domain      = ["geosite:category-ads"]
    }
  ])
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Snippet name (2-255 chars).
- `snippet` (String) Snippet content as JSON array string.
